```{=html}
<div style="width:92%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:0.85em;">
  <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.14em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.25em;">a column has missing values</div>
  <div style="font-size:0.85em;color:#5654A2;font-weight:700;">What should you do? <span style="color:#9B8EA0;font-weight:400;">It depends why.</span></div>
 </div>

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.55em;text-align:left;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.9em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.08);border-left:3px solid #5654A2;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#5654A2;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.3em;">at random</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:0.35em;">Sensor blip. Forgot to record.</div>
   <div style="display:flex;gap:0.3em;flex-wrap:wrap;">
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;background:#E5F2EE;color:#2C8475;padding:0.15em 0.45em;border-radius:5px;">✓ impute / drop</span>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;background:#FCEEEC;color:#D45F47;padding:0.15em 0.45em;border-radius:5px;">✕ as-zero</span>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.9em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.08);border-left:3px solid #5654A2;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#5654A2;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.3em;">systematic</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:0.35em;">Question skipped on purpose.</div>
   <div style="display:flex;gap:0.3em;flex-wrap:wrap;">
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;background:#E5F2EE;color:#2C8475;padding:0.15em 0.45em;border-radius:5px;">✓ encode as category</span>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;background:#FCEEEC;color:#D45F47;padding:0.15em 0.45em;border-radius:5px;">✕ mean impute</span>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.9em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.08);border-left:3px solid #5654A2;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#5654A2;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.3em;">structurally undefined</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:0.35em;">"Spouse income" for unmarried.</div>
   <div style="display:flex;gap:0.3em;flex-wrap:wrap;">
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;background:#E5F2EE;color:#2C8475;padding:0.15em 0.45em;border-radius:5px;">✓ filter subgroup</span>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;background:#FCEEEC;color:#D45F47;padding:0.15em 0.45em;border-radius:5px;">✕ impute</span>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.9em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.08);border-left:3px solid #5654A2;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#5654A2;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.3em;">unit changed</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:0.35em;">Mid-collection switch.</div>
   <div style="display:flex;gap:0.3em;flex-wrap:wrap;">
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;background:#E5F2EE;color:#2C8475;padding:0.15em 0.45em;border-radius:5px;">✓ split at change</span>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;background:#FCEEEC;color:#D45F47;padding:0.15em 0.45em;border-radius:5px;">✕ treat as one</span>
   </div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.85em;text-align:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#D45F47;letter-spacing:0.06em;font-style:italic;">
  AI's default move &nbsp;·&nbsp; <span style="color:#564232;font-style:normal;">mean impute &mdash; <strong>wrong in 3 of 4</strong></span>
 </div>

</div>
```
